summary: iter247 Global Search overhaul + SmartSearchBar — backend contract fully passes, frontend flows work end-to-end after two build-blocking issues were fixed (broken edit in CinemaResults.jsx + missing /utils/icons.js). 4/4 pytest cases pass. UI tests cover Cysoul event row with thumbnail+rich subtitle, View-all modal grouped by type with deep_link click, Hotels/Events/Cinema SmartSearchBar, Hotels Place chip + Clear, Operator deep link.

ui_bugs.issue: Build-blocking syntax error: 16 lines of leftover/duplicated JSX fragment (`teredFilms.length > 0 && (...`) trailing after the component's closing brace caused `vite build` to fail with `Unexpected '}'`. Frontend was returning 502 Bad Gateway until the trailing block was removed.

GlobalSearchAllModal.jsx imports `{ getIconComponent } from '@/utils/icons'` but the module did not exist, causing `Could not load /app/frontend/src/utils/icons` rollup error. Created stub re-exporting Layout.jsx's existing iconMap so the build succeeds.

integration_issues.flow: Operator deep link pre-filter on /admin/operators page
integration_issues.issue: Clicking the Carter operator row from global search correctly navigates to /admin/operators?search=<operator_id>, but the OperatorManagement table does not visually pre-filter to that operator — all 7 operators remain listed and the 'Search operators...' input stays empty. Deep-link URL is correct; the param consumer on the page is missing/not wired.

action_items: Main agent must address the CinemaResults.jsx broken-edit hygiene (already patched here, but indicates the search/replace that introduced SmartSearchBar left dangling code).
Wire `?search=<operator_id>` query param consumption on /admin/operators to pre-filter the table when arriving from the global search operator row.
Optional: move the inline iconMap from Layout.jsx to /utils/icons.js (created here) to keep a single source of truth.
critical_code_review_comments: CinemaResults.jsx had garbage trailing JSX after the component close — this build-blocking artefact reached production-preview. Recommend a pre-commit `vite build` gate.
GlobalSearchAllModal.jsx introduced an import to a file that was never created (/utils/icons). Suggests the changeset was not validated by `vite build` before being merged.
Backend /api/search rewrite is clean: accent-insensitive regex helper, by_type grouping, and proper thumbnail/deep_link contract verified.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/utils/icons.js (NEW - shared lucide-react icon resolver to unblock build)
seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing seed data (Cysoul Concert, Tech Summit Yaounde, Carter Entertainment, Yaoundé/Douala hotels).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend /api/search/ contract is 100% green. Frontend SmartSearchBar + global-search dropdown + modal flows are all working. Two build-blocking issues had to be fixed for the frontend to even boot — these patches must be preserved. Remaining open item: /admin/operators page does not honour ?search query param (deep link arrives but table is not pre-filtered).
rca of the issue: 1. CinemaResults.jsx: A broken search/replace left a duplicated Pagination JSX block AFTER the closing function brace, causing esbuild to fail with 'Unexpected }'. Removed lines 691-707. 2. GlobalSearchAllModal.jsx imported '@/utils/icons' but the file was never created. Created /app/frontend/src/utils/icons.js that mirrors Layout.jsx's existing iconMap. After both fixes, `vite build` succeeds and the preview server boots on port 3000.
